news.title: Russia imposes ban on gasoline exports for producers until end-July
news.description: Russia bans gasoline exports until end-July to stabilize domestic supply amid high seasonal demand and rising global oil prices.

news.description: Markets have recoiled as war jitters over Iran deepened, with stocks sliding, oil surging well over $100 per barrel and the dollar firming after US President Donald Trump dashed hopes for clarity on when the Middle East conflict might end.

news.description: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer said the UK will convene talks with about 35 countries this week on reopening the Strait of Hormuz, as tensions in the Middle East disrupt global energy supplies.

news.title: IEA chief says current energy crisis worse than past oil shocks
news.description: The current global energy crisis is more severe than the oil shocks of 1973 and 1979 and the 2022 gas shortage linked to Russia's war on Ukraine, the head of the International Energy Agency said Wednesday, Anadolu Agency reported.

clusters.title: Global Market Impact

clusters.title: Energy Crises

clusters.title: Policy Responses

stocks.ai_explanation: Exxon Mobil Corporation (XOM) is a major American multinational corporation engaged in the exploration, production, refining, marketing, and distribution of petroleum products. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.

Chevron Corporation (CVX) is an American multinational corporation focused on the exploration, production, transportation, and sale of crude oil and natural gas. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
Neste Oy (NEE) is a Finnish company specializing in renewable fuels, including biofuels and aviation kerosene. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
Shell plc (SHEL) is a British multinational oil and gas company headquartered in London. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
British Petroleum (BP) is a multinational oil and gas company based in London. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.

disclaimer: Educational use only. Not financial advice.
